---
name: Harness Adapter Request
about: Request or propose an adapter for a new agent harness
title: "[Adapter] "
labels: adapter, enhancement
---

**Which harness?**
Name and link to the harness/framework (e.g., LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen).

**Log format:**
Describe how the harness logs tool usage. What files, what format (JSON, JSONL, plain text)?

**Example log entry:**
```
paste a sample log entry showing a tool call
```

**Are you willing to contribute the adapter?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build this
- [ ] No, just requesting it

**Additional context:**
Any other relevant information about the harness's execution model.
